title: The 2026 Honda Prelude is a marvel of hybrid technology
summary: For chassis refinement that behooves both a comfortable ride quality and engaging dynamics, Honda reinforced the Prelude’s chassis in critical areas, gave it the Civic Type R’s dual-axis front suspension, adaptive dampers to help iron out roadway ripples, and a thicker rear…
